articles.title: Solana ($SOL) Integrates AI With ChatGPT Plugin to Make Blockchain More ‘Usable and Understandable’
articles.description: The Solana Foundation, a nonprofit entity dedicated to the maintenance and development of the Solana blockchain, revealed that it has incorporated artificial intelligence (AI) using a ChatGPT plugin developed by Solana Labs. The developers of Solana informed that the ChatGPT plugin is readily available on GitHub for download, as Cointelegraph reports, as it aims to […]

articles.title: Aave considers proposal to expand into Coinbase-backed Base network
articles.description: Aave is considering a proposal to deploy its V3 on the emerging Base network, a Layer 2 blockchain solution backed by Coinbase.

articles.title: Crypto Funds Lose Millions for Fifth Week as $LTC and $XRP Attract Investors
articles.description: Institutional investors have kept on moving funds out of cryptocurrency investment products over the past week, marking a fifth consecutive week of outflows that has now reached a cumulative $232 million. The outflow represents a 0.7% decrease in total assets under management. According to CoinShares’ latest Digital Asset Fund Flows report, the volume of cryptocurrency […]
